title: townsendia lemhiensis
intro: Townsendia lemhiensis, also known as Lemhi Townsendia, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant is native to the western United States and has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits. The medicinal properties of Townsendia lemhiensis include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds and soothe irritated skin. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and salves, to harness its health benefits and promote overall well-being.
